questions.q: What is the name of the new fund Prime Minister Mark Carney launched on April 7, 2026, to address infrastructure gaps across Canada with a $51-billion investment over 10 years?
questions.correctText: Prime Minister Mark Carney officially launched the Build Communities Strong Fund, a $51 billion investment over 10 years, on April 7, 2026, to address infrastructure gaps across the country.

questions.q: According to news reports from April 7, 2026, what is the current trend for house prices in Canada's most expensive cities?
questions.correctText: Housing prices are dipping in Canada's priciest markets, though experts suggest it may still not be a good market for first-time homebuyers.

questions.q: On April 7, 2026, which Canadian astronaut did Donald Trump praise for his courage following the Artemis II moon flyby, mentioning that even Wayne Gretzky might not 'want to do that'?
questions.correctText: Donald Trump praised Canadian Space Agency astronaut Jeremy Hansen for his courage after the Artemis II mission, where he traveled farther from Earth than any human in history.

questions.q: What is the new price for a Lotto Max ticket in Canada, effective April 7, 2026, according to Globalnews.ca?
questions.correctText: Starting April 7, 2026, the cost of a Lotto Max ticket is increasing from $5 to $6.

questions.q: Why did Montreal withdraw its candidacy to host 2026 FIFA World Cup games, according to news reports on April 7, 2026?
options: Restrictive FIFA conditions and funding issues
Competing bids from other Canadian cities
questions.correctText: Montreal withdrew its bid to host 2026 FIFA World Cup games due to restrictive FIFA conditions and funding issues, as revealed in an investigative program.
